title: tabebuia heterophylla
intro: Tabebuia heterophylla, also known as the Pink Trumpet Tree or Lapacho, is a flowering tree native to South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains lapachol, a compound with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Tabebuia heterophylla include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
